'''''Razor's Kiss''''' was an [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] built at [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]].

==History==
[[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] sent a boarding party to hijack the vessel before full completion, unaware that the party had been infiltrated by [[Wraith Squadron]].

The captured ship broke free of the shipyard at which she was docked and left to rendezvous with Zsinj's flagship [[Iron Fist (Executor-class)|''Iron Fist'']], unaware that [[Shalla Nelprin]] of [[Wraith Squadron]] had docked her stolen [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE/IN interceptor]] on her hull while escaping.

Shalla took out the [[Star Dreadnought/Legends|Star Dreadnought's]] shield generators and bridge, allowing a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] battle group, led by the ''[[Mon Remonda]]'' and commanded by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], to finish the job.

It is assumed that after realizing the ship was lost Zsinj sent a self destruct command (as the ship actually blew up) rather than let it fall into the hands of the New Republic.

After the battle, Zsinj expended considerable resources to recover as much of the ''Razor's Kiss'' wreckage as possible. The remains of the destroyed Star Dreadnought were used to create the ''[[Second Death]]''.

{{Ship-stub}}
